name: Heath Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake according to directions in a 9 x 13 inch pan.
2. Let it cool for just 15 minutes after baking.
3. Mix sweetened condensed milk and caramel ice cream topping.
4. Poke holes all over the top of the cake with a fork or the handle of a wooden spoon.
5. Pour the milk/ice cream mixture over the top of the cake.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely.
7. Spread Cool Whip over the top.
8. Sprinkle Bits-O'-Brickle or broken up Heath bars over all.
9. Refrigerate the cake for several hours before serving. It is best made the day before serving.
